nasb.text: Now you write to the Jews as you see fit, in the king’s name, and seal it with the king’s signet ring; for a decree which is written in the name of the king and sealed with the king’s signet ring may not be revoked.”

esv.text: But you may write as you please with regard to the Jews, in the name of the king, and seal it with the king’s ring, for an edict written in the name of the king and sealed with the king’s ring cannot be revoked.”

cnv.text: 現在你們可以照著你們的意思，奉王的名為猶大人寫諭旨，用王的印戒蓋上；因為奉王的名所寫，用王的戒指蓋上印的諭旨，是沒有人可以廢除的。”

ccb.text: 现在，你们尽可奉王的名写谕旨给犹太人，用王的戒指盖印，因为奉王的名所写、用王的戒指盖印的谕旨是不可废除的。”
